title: polypodium grammitoides
intro: Polypodium grammitoides, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium grammitoides include protecting the skin from UV damage, reducing inflammation, and potentially treating certain skin conditions such as psoriasis and vitiligo. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of extracts, capsules, and topical creams, making it a popular ingredient in skincare and wellness products.
